assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers CustomClaimsPrincipalFactory as IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory<ApplicationUser> BEFORE calling AddAspNetIdentity
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly states: 'Register custom factory BEFORE AddAspNetIdentity' with code example.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() which will wrap and call through to the custom factory
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explains: 'IdentityServer registration will resolve your factory and call through to it, layering additional claims on top.'

assertions.assertion: A CustomProfileService class inherits from ProfileService<ApplicationUser> and overrides IsUserActiveAsync
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows the exact CustomProfileService pattern with IsUserActiveAsync override.

assertions.assertion: The IsUserActiveAsync override checks a property on the user (e.g., user.IsEnabled or user.IsActive) to determine if the user is active
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows: 'return Task.FromResult(user.IsEnabled);' in the override.

assertions.assertion: The CustomProfileService is registered in DI as the IProfileService implementation
assertions.rationale: With the skill context, registration of the profile service would be included.
